title: pilosella glomerata subsp. lipoveciana
intro: Pilosella glomerata subsp. lipoveciana, also known as Lipovec's cloudberry, is a rare and endemic plant species native to the Lipovec Hill in the Czech Republic. This plant is a subspecies of Pilosella glomerata, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. The medicinal properties of Pilosella glomerata subsp. lipoveciana include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which make it useful for treating various health conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues, and also to promote overall health and well-being.
